Demonstrates heap allocation and memory usage in a Pebble app, with metadata and build script.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Demonstrates heap allocation and memory usage display in a Pebble app.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the AppHeap Demo application, including UUID, version, and company information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options to customize build rules.
